templates.name: Can I return final sale item?
templates.content: I'm afraid all products that are marked final sale, are over 20% discount, or otherwise noted in a sale terms and conditions cannot be returned.

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Our clothes generally run true to size. Please refer to the "Size and Fit" in the product page or view our sizing chart to determine the best fit for you!  https://dippindaisys.com/pages/size-chart

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can learn more and sign up here https://dippindaisys.com/pages/ambassador-program

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on U.S. and Canada orders over $100. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Retroactive discount request
templates.content: Unfortunately, you cannot make changes to your order post-checkout. Please contact us asap at hello@dippindaisys.com for assistance.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://dippindaisys.com/collections/sale?filter.v.availability=1

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at hello@dippindaisys.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/dippindaisys/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/dippindaisys/

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We usually ship via UPS or USPS and depending on the shipping method selected at checkout, orders can take up to 9 business days for domestic orders and 14 business days for international orders.

templates.name: When will I receive my exchange order?
templates.content: Exchange orders will be shipped once your return is in transit to us. Please allow 5-9 days for your exchange order to arrive.

templates.name: Affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can learn more and sign up here https://dippindaisys.com/pages/affiliate-program

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can learn more and sign up here https://dippindaisys.com/pages/wholesale

templates.name: What is Route?
templates.content: We've partnered with Route-a package protection and tracking solution-to give our customers the best possible delivery experience. Route offers a few options to improve the experience:

templates.name: How (and how soon) will I receive my refund?
templates.content: Once a return is received at our warehouse, it takes about 10 days to process. After it is processed, please allow 3-5 business days for the credit to show in your account.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out!

templates.name: How should I wash my Dippin' Daisy's suit?
templates.content: To ensure the longest life for your Dippin' Daisy's suit, we suggest hand-washing it since machine cycles can be rough and snag the ties and fabric. If you wash your suit in a machine, please make sure to run it on a delicate setting and hang dry your suit.

templates.name: Are returns free?
templates.content: We do deduct the cost of the shipping label, $8, to return your items from your total refund, but there will be no further out of pocket cost to you.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 626-782-7620 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://dippindaisys.com/pages/loyalty-program

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Unfortunately, you cannot make changes to your order post-checkout. Please contact us asap at hello@dippindaisys.com for assistance.

templates.name: Do you offer free exchanges?
templates.content: Yes, we offer free exchanges. You can start your exchange here https://dippindaisys.com/apps/redo/returns-portal/login Please note that exchanges that cost more than the original/returning item will require you to pay the difference.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://dippindaisys.com/pages/return-policy and you can initiate your return here https://dippindaisys.com/apps/redo/returns-portal/login
